Container.Name: PlexTraktSync
Container.Overview: Sync your Plex watch history to Trakt.tv with a clean web UI. Features: Movies and TV show sync, automatic scheduled syncing (interval, daily, or cron), encrypted secret storage, setup wizard, sync history log, and connection testing.
Container.Description: Plex to Trakt.tv watch history sync with web UI. Connects to your Plex server, reads watched movies and TV episodes, and syncs them to your Trakt.tv profile. Supports automatic scheduling and encrypted credential storage.

Config.Name: Config Storage
Config.Description: Persistent storage for encrypted config and sync history

Config.Name: Flask Secret Key
Config.Description: Random string for session security. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Encryption Key
Config.Description: Optional: Fernet key for encrypting secrets. Auto-generated if empty.
